result.preview: [{"track_id": "4122", "title": "Street Hype", "artist": "Brucqe Maginnis", "album": "Groove City", "year": "2005", "length": "177000", "language": "English"}, {"track_id": "4628", "title": "Street Hype - Groove City", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "None", "year": "'05", "length": "2.95", "language": "English"}, {"track_id": "14080", "title": "011-Street Hype", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "Groove City (2005)", "year": "None", "length": "2m 57sec", "language": "Eng."}]

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%streethype%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%streethype%';

args.query:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;
